items.title: Shower, skincare, brush & floss
details: 1. Cleanse — Neutrogena Ultra Gentle Daily Cleanser
2. Eye — The Ordinary Caffeine Solution 5% + EGCG (1-2 drops, orbital bone)
3. Hydrate — The Ordinary Hyaluronic Acid 2% + B5 (damp face)
4. Protect — Rose Hip Seed Oil (2-3 drops)
5. Moisturize — The Ordinary NMF + HA
6. SPF — CeraVe Hydrating Sheer Sunscreen SPF 30
7. Lip — Jack Black Intense Therapy Lip Balm SPF 25
Oral: Brush → Floss (Oral-B Glide) → Rinse (Crest Deep Cleanse)

details: Crestor
Ritual Men's Multivitamin
Ritual Probiotic
Ritual Melatonin
Fish Oil
1. Cleanse — Neutrogena Ultra Gentle Daily Cleanser
2. Active — Retinol + Vitamin C Cream (pea-sized, wait 15-20 min)
3. Optional — Niacinamide 10% + Zinc 1% (2-3x/week)
4. Eye — Multi-Peptide Eye Serum (tap around orbital bone)
5. Moisturize — The Ordinary NMF + HA
6. Optional — CeraVe Skin Renewing Night Cream (2-3x/week rotation)
Oral: Brush → Floss (Oral-B Glide) → Rinse (Crest Deep Cleanse)
